title: sphenostigma mandonii
intro: Sphenostigma mandonii, also known as the 'Thai Mother Tincture', is a type of plant used in traditional medicine. It belongs to the family Achariaceae and is commonly found in Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Sphenostigma mandonii include its ability to stimulate the immune system and its anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as tinctures, capsules, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
